title: The Pumpkin Eater
actors: Anne Bancroft, Peter Finch, James Mason
plot: Beautiful mother of five Jo leaves the banality of her marriage to second husband Giles to wed her passionate screenwriter lover, Jake Armitage. As her suspicion of Jake's philandering grows, Jo's sanity spirals.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 6 wins & 6 nominations total
